mapper.sql: SELECT token_id, member_id, refresh_token, user_agent, issued_at, expires_at, last_used_at, is_revoked FROM member_token
mapper.select: WHERE refresh_token = #{refreshToken} AND is_revoked = false AND expires_at > NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE member_token set is_revoked = true, last_used_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND user_agent = #{userAgent} AND is_revoked = false
UPDATE member_token set is_revoked = true, last_used_at = NOW(), expires_at = NOW() WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_revoked = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_token ( member_id, refresh_token, user_agent, issued_at, expires_at, last_used_at, is_revoked ) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{refreshToken}, #{userAgent}, NOW(), #{expiresAt}, NOW(), #{isRevoked} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE refresh_token = VALUES(refresh_token), expires_at = VALUES(expires_at), last_used_at = NOW(), is_revoked = VALUES(is_revoked)
